variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 4022 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 4022 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 4022 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25696 Air Filter Filter - Panel | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 4022
variants.description: Fleetguard® AF25696 spin-on lube filter meets or exceeds OE performance requirements and the new challenges of modern engine technology.
